name: basalt-ui
description: The basalt-ui design-system marketplace. Ships the 'basalt' plugin: design/charts/app skills that own the visx + Mantine chart-and-design doctrine. Pair the plugin with 'basalt init' — the plugin ships skills, init ships the project doctrine (rules + CLAUDE block + DESIGN.md) that plugins cannot.

plugins.name: basalt
plugins.description: Design-system companion for Mantine + visx apps built on basalt-ui. Skills for the design/theme-lab loop, adding charts (kinds + consumer series), and scaffolding an app via 'basalt init'.
